subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and through them hath opened wide the gates of divine knowledge unto all who dwell in the realm of possibility. Exalted be He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و فتح بها ابواب العرفان علی من فی الامکان تعالی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
